title: berkheya maritima
intro: Berkheya maritima, also known as the coastal daisy or Cape daisy, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern coast of South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a valuable remedy for various health issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties, contributing to its numerous health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. In herbal medicine, Berkheya maritima can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat conditions like digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems.
